n: Chapter 2.1: Heirloom of the Wild Men

steps.t: Ghân-buri-Ghân is the leader of the Drúedain and may know the origins of the corrupted carving. He is at Drû Bhûta, in Taur Drúadan.
Khôr-buri-Ghân is at the Blood-cloak, east of the great waterfall in Drû Bhûta, atop a large rocky cliff. It is the location where the Wild Men perfor…
Khôr-buri-Ghân suggested that you look for Orcs at two places in Taur Drúadan, forth of Drû Bhûta and further north-east of there, in the woods.
Khôr-buri-Ghân suggested that you look for Orcs at another place in Taur Drúadan, north-west over a hill.
Elrond is at the Haven of Orladion in Rivendell, north-west of the Last Homely House. You have cleansed the corruption from the Memento of Bhai-buri-G…
